changelog: Sendspin Protocol fully refactored—standard type+payload format, legacy compatible. Fixed passive mode deadlock, HTTP handshake frame consumption, added onStreamConfig/clear callbacks, dual connection monitoring, auto-reconnect, URL normalization. Audio frame parsing supports 4/5-byte variants. Fixed Android ≤9 audio crashes, timeline corruption, auto-brightness accidents. Added screen orientation for camera-less devices. Unified audio buffer sizing reduces latency on low-end hardware. WebSocket race conditions fixed, background keep-alive enhanced for domestic ROMs, NPEs patched, exception logging improved, dependencies secured. Thanks @danwi for architecture guidance, @笨笨的蘑菇, @乘凉, @yaro24.
